promotions.title: Free Hoodie and Flannel Sale
content: Get a free hoodie on orders of $99+ or a free Frontier flannel on orders of $198+.  Discount applies automatically when the item is added to cart.

Toynk: Thank you for your purchase! Your order number is 280437. View more information about your order here: https://toynk.attn.tv/aODSerwz4-Ti .
Toynk: Welcome to Toynk! Msg & data rates may apply. Msg frequency varies. Reply HELP for help, STOP to cancel.
Toynk: Hey this is Jordan, how can I help you?
I need to change the shipping address on my order
I no longer live there
Hello?
Toynk: I'm sorry to hear that! I can check if that's possible. Can I please have your order number, email address, and correct shipping address?
I cannot access the order number for some reason
My email is xreinstein¡gmail.com
Shipping address would be- 1910 evergreen park drive SW, Olympia wa 98502
That's the order number
Sorry
Hello?
Toynk: Thanks for the info! I will pass this along to my team and get back to you as soon as possible.
Dude, I can't have it sent to that address
I saved to buy these for my boyfriend

Toynk: Sorry for the delay. I'm still waiting for an answer from my team regarding this issue. Please allow us a bit more time to sort this out for you. I will reach out to you as soon as I hear back from them. Thanks a ton for your patience!
Thank you
Toynk: No problem. Feel free to reach out anytime, I'm always here to help!
I just need this to be resolved.

Toynk: I get where you're coming from because I'm a consumer, too. I will be sure to text you as soon as they provide an update. 

Feel free to reach out if anything comes up while we wait for the team's response.

I'll just be waiting for your response. Do I need to cancel the order and order again or what? I would need the money put back into my bank account as it is all I have. This is for my boyfriend and I had to sell some of my books to have enough to pay for this.

Toynk: I completely understand your concern. I don't currently know how our team will handle this, but as soon as I have more info I will let you know. Is there anything else that I can do for you today?

promotions.title: Cyber Monday
content:
• Spend $200 → 25% off

• Spend $300 → 35% off

• Discount applied automatically at checkout.

• Exclusions: Gift cards. Cannot combine with other offers, codes, coupons, or promotions. Non-transferable and not valid on previous purchases.

• Gift with Purchase: Available on orders $300+ (before taxes). Select at checkout. Limit one gift per order. Valid 12/1/25 or while supplies last. Not eligible for return or exchange.

• Valid: 12/1/25 – 12/3/25.

promotions.title: VIP Black Friday
content:
Tiered Discount & Gift Promotion

• Spend $200 → 25% off

• Spend $300 → 35% off

• Discount applied automatically at checkout.

• Excludes: Gift cards. Cannot combine with other offers. Non-transferable. Not valid on previous purchases.

Gift with Purchase

• Use code VIP2025 for a free gift with orders $300+ (before taxes).

• Valid 11/24/25 – 11/30/25, 11:59 PM EST, or while supplies last.

• Limit one gift per order. Not eligible for return or exchange.

Exclusions & Rules
